delegations.task_goal: Review the allowlisted one-shot read path for correctness, security, privacy, and missing tests.
validation_expectation: findings with file/line evidence and missing checks
delegations.output_format: findings, commands reviewed, remaining risks, scope confirmation
delegations.result: Two P1 findings were fixed and covered; temporary target cleanup was also added. Main controller reran focused and full validation.

write_ownership: .loom/** for HARBOR-245 and the serialized current-pointer transfer
forbidden_targets: credentials, cookies, verification codes, raw profile, DOM, HAR, network bodies, or screenshot bytes
ownership_constraints.shared_carrier_policy: Only the main controller edits shared current/bootstrap carriers.

write_ownership: Harbor #245 runtime implementation, tests, and item-specific carriers

validation.live_evidence: Pending after merge: the implementation PR uses fixture and contract evidence only; #245 remains open until an authorized managed-session read produces refs consumed by Core/App.

safety_boundary: No production page/account/profile action during implementation validation; no automatic login, sensitive-material access, submit, publish, send, save, bulk collection, hosted browser, marketplace, or risk-control bypass.
